summary: Tested redesigned Shop page with premium design philosophy (Apple + Aesop + Airbnb). All major features working correctly. Hero section, trust badges, products/services toggle, search, and promise section all functional. Personal Picks section code is correct but requires logged-in user with registered pets to display.

issues: 404 errors on some resource loads - minor, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: Note: Test credentials in review_request had typo - 'dipali@clubconcerge.in' should be 'dipali@clubconcierge.in' (missing 'i' in concierge). Created testpicks@example.com/test123 for testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Hero section displays core message: 'The easiest place in India to do the right thing for your dog.'
✅ Trust badges section shows all 4 badges: Vet-approved, Clean ingredients, Free delivery over ₹499, Satisfaction promise
✅ PersonalPicks component correctly requires logged-in user with pets (line 228: if (!pets?.length) return null)
✅ Pet selector buttons data-testid format: pet-selector-{petName} correctly implemented
✅ Products tab shows product cards with minimal Aesop-style design and 'Add to bag' buttons
✅ Services tab shows service cards with description, price, and 'Get a quote' text
✅ Products/Services toggle works correctly with pill-style buttons
✅ Search input filters products correctly (tested: 'chicken' filtered 641→96 products)
✅ Promise section at bottom has dark background (#2D2D2D) with trust messaging
✅ Mobile responsive design at 375px viewport shows 2-column grid and all elements
✅ Add to Cart functionality works - cart drawer slides in with product details
✅ Design tokens correctly applied: cream background #F7F5F0, charcoal text #2D2D2D, sage accent #7A8B6F

success_rate.backend: 100% - Products API (641 products), Services API (50 services) working

test_credentials.created_for_testing: testpicks@example.com / test123 (user with 2 pets: Buddy, Luna)
test_credentials.note: Original credentials had typo in email domain

seed_data_creation: Created test user testpicks@example.com with 2 pets (Buddy - Golden Retriever, Luna - Labrador) for Personal Picks testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page redesign complete with Apple+Aesop+Airbnb design philosophy. Key data-testids: shop-page, shop-search, tab-products, tab-services, personal-picks-section (requires logged-in user with pets), pet-selector-{petName}, product-card-{id}, add-to-cart-{id}. Personal Picks section only appears when user is logged in AND has registered pets. Created testpicks@example.com/test123 user with 2 pets for testing.

hero_section.core_message: The easiest place in India to do the right thing for your dog.

personal_picks_section.note: Code correctly implemented - section only shows for logged-in users with pets

products_tab.card_design: Minimal Aesop-style with 'Add to bag' button

promise_section.content: Our promise to you and your companion + 4 trust badges with details

add_to_cart.behavior: Cart drawer slides in with product, quantity, subtotal, shipping, checkout button
